LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ALCATRAZ CRUISES LLC AND ALCATRAZ FLEET LLC'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER AS TO DEPOSITION OF MR TERRY MCCRAE IS DENIED. THE COURT ADOPTS THE REASONING OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM AS STATED IN HER REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION. MR. SPAULDING IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. THE DURATION OF THE DEPOSITION IS LIMITED TO ONE HOUR. IF MORE TIME IS NEEDED, THE PARTIES ARE TO MEET AND CONFER. IF THE PARTIES CAN NOT AGREE, THEY MAY CONTACT THE COURT FOR ASSISTANCE OR COME IN EX PARTE. THE DEPOSITION IS TO BE TAKEN WITHIN 20-DAYS OR 3-DAYS AFTER MR. MCCRAE RETURNS FROM VACATION. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order As To Deposition Of Mr Terry Mccrae
Off Calendar Apr-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephen Purtill of Law Offices of Stephen J. Purtill telephone number 415-652-4021 for Plaintiffs Juan Gallardo and Elva Gallardo.
Galin Luk of Cox Wooton Lerner Griffin & Hansen LLP telephone number 415-438-4600 for Defendants Alcatraz Cruises LLC and Alcatraz Fleet LLC.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ALCATRAZ CRUISES LLC and ALCATRAZ FLEET LLC'S Motion For Protective Order As To The Deposition Of Mr. Terry McCrae is denied. The court adopts the reasoning of the Judge Pro Tem as stated in her report and recommendation. Mr. Spaulding is to prepare a form of order. The duration of the deposition is limited to one hour. If more time is needed, the Parties are to meet and confer. If the Parties can not agree, they may contact the Court for assistance or come in ex parte. The deposition is to be taken within 20-days or 3-days after Mr. McCrae returns from vacation.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
